hero.name: Saroj Devkota
hero.bio: Building at the intersection of code, design, and infrastructure.

about.heading: About Me
about.body: I'm Saroj Devkota — a third-year Computing student with a rare triple focus: full-stack web development, enterprise networking, and interior design. I thrive at the crossroads of logic and aesthetics, building systems that are both robust and beautiful.

achievements.title: Built Home Networking Lab
achievements.description: Configured routers, switches, IP addressing, and basic network troubleshooting in a practical home lab environment.

certifications.name: Networking Basics
certifications.description: Successfully completed the Networking Basics course through Cisco Networking Academy, gaining foundational knowledge in networking concepts, IP addressing, network protocols, routing, switching, and basic network troubleshooting.

certifications.name: Cisco Packet Tracer
certifications.description: Hands-on network simulation using Cisco Packet Tracer.

certifications.name: Linux Unhatched
certifications.description: Successfully completed the NDG Linux Unhatched course offered through Cisco Networking Academy, gaining foundational knowledge of Linux operating systems, command-line navigation, file management, system operations, and essential skills for networking and IT infrastructure roles.

certifications.name: Microsoft Excel
certifications.description: Successfully completed the Introduction to MS Excel course powered by Microsoft through Simplilearn SkillUp, gaining foundational knowledge in spreadsheet management, formulas and functions, data organization, and analytical skills for professional and technical applications.

projects.title: Donation & Volunteer Management System
projects.description: Full-stack Django application streamlining donations, volunteer coordination, and organizational management with role-based access control and real-time dashboards.

projects.title: IoT Obstacle-Avoiding Robot
projects.description: Built an IoT-enabled mobile robot with ultrasonic sensing, obstacle avoidance, and remote monitoring. Watch the live demo below showing autonomous navigation through a testing course.
features: IoT telemetry for remote status monitoring
Real-time sensor fusion with ultrasonic and infrared arrays
YouTube demo of robot navigating a test course

projects.title: AI Image & Text Models
projects.description: Developed two machine learning models from scratch: a CNN-based car logo image detection system that classifies brand logos from images, and an RNN-based text conversion model for sequence-to-sequence text processing.
features: CNN model for car logo image detection & brand classification
RNN model for text sequence conversion and processing
Custom training pipelines with data augmentation
Model evaluation with accuracy & loss metrics
Built using TensorFlow / Keras with Python

volunteer.title: Cyber Security Awareness Trainer
volunteer.description: Delivered hands-on cybersecurity training covering digital hygiene, phishing prevention, and safe online practices to local community members.

volunteer.title: Breast Cancer Awareness Volunteer
volunteer.description: Participated in awareness campaigns focused on early detection and community education across local neighbourhoods.

volunteer.title: Educational Tutoring Volunteer
volunteer.description: Free tutoring in mathematics, computing, and science to students from underserved backgrounds.

volunteer.title: Public Speaking & Leadership Development
volunteer.description: Active participation in workshops and leadership programmes developing communication and organisational skills.
